internal/telegram/auth.go.one_line: Terminal-based interactive authentication flow with phone/code/password prompts

internal/telegram/client.go.one_line: Telegram client wrapper with session persistence and authentication orchestration

internal/telegram/messages.go.one_line: Message model and channel/message fetching operations from Telegram API

internal/telegram/session.go.one_line: File-based session storage implementing gotd session interface for Telegram persistence
